prologue_01.speaker: narrator
prologue_01.text: There is no before. Only the moment you open your eyes.

prologue_02.speaker: narrator
prologue_02.text: Stone beneath you. Cold, but not unpleasant. The smell of something burning — wax, and something older than wax.

prologue_03.speaker: narrator
prologue_03.text: You are in a tower. You do not know how you know this. You simply do.

prologue_04.speaker: narrator
prologue_04.text: In your hand — warm, impossibly warm for something made of paper — a deck of cards.

prologue_05.speaker: narrator
prologue_05.text: You do not remember your name. But the cards do.

ch1_arrive_01.speaker: narrator
ch1_arrive_01.text: The tower has three hundred and three steps. You know this before you count them.

ch1_arrive_02.speaker: narrator
ch1_arrive_02.text: At the top: a door. Behind the door: a voice.

ch1_voice_01.speaker: oracle
ch1_voice_01.text: I wondered when you'd arrive. You're later than I expected. Or earlier. Time is unreliable here.

ch1_voice_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_voice_02.text: Don't be alarmed. I'm not a threat. I'm merely... observant.

choices.text: How do you know I'd arrive?

ch1_where_01.speaker: oracle
ch1_where_01.text: Between. That's the only honest answer I can give you right now.

ch1_where_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_where_02.text: Between what? Between everything you were and everything you might become.

ch1_who_01.speaker: oracle
ch1_who_01.text: That's the right question. Most people ask where first.

ch1_who_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_who_02.text: I go by {oracle}. And I have been here... longer than I care to calculate.

ch1_how_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_how_02.text: That's a better question than you know. The short answer: the cards told me.

ch1_how_03.speaker: oracle
ch1_how_03.text: The long answer... will take time we haven't yet decided to spend together.

ch1_silent_01.speaker: oracle
ch1_silent_01.text: Silent. Interesting. Most people are either afraid or curious in the first moments.

ch1_silent_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_silent_02.text: You're neither, apparently. I'll remember that.

ch1_common_continue.speaker: oracle
ch1_common_continue.text: The others are here too, somewhere in the tower. They're... less welcoming than I am. Fair warning.

ch1_card_moment_01.speaker: narrator
ch1_card_moment_01.text: The deck shifts in your hand. One card pushes to the surface.

ch1_drew_fool.speaker: oracle
ch1_drew_fool.text: The Fool. A beginning. But you already know that, don't you? You can feel it.

ch1_drew_judgement_02.speaker: oracle
ch1_drew_judgement_02.text: Where did you — how did that —

ch1_drew_judgement_03.speaker: oracle
ch1_drew_judgement_03.text: We should find the others. Quickly.

ch1_drew_other.speaker: oracle
ch1_drew_other.text: The cards are speaking already. They know you're here.

ch1_oracle_exit.speaker: oracle
ch1_oracle_exit.text: Come. The tower is large, but it remembers who's in it. We'll find them.
